subject: (no subject)
body:
Good afternoon,

 

Please note that effective immediately my email address has changed to 

 

karlk@lawhold.com

 

This is only an email address change - all other business contact
information remains the same.  Please change your contact list
accordingly.  Email sent to my limitedbrands email address will be
forwarded to my new email account for the next 30 days.  

 

Many thanks.

 

 

Karl Koon

Personal Assistant to

Abigail S. Wexner

Phone: (614) 939-3055

Fax: (614) 939-3062

Cell: (614) 419-8041

Email: karlk@lawhold.com
